entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "स्टिभ जब्ससँग महत्वाकांक्षाको बारेमा बहस गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "ग्रेटा थनबर्गसँग जलवायु नीतिमा बहस गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "ब्याटम्यानसँग न्यायको बारेमा बहस गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Argument learning का लागि inspir मा Debate with a personality प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: तर्क

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: personality छान्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: व्यक्तित्वसँग बहस गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: AI प्रयोग गरेर Personality सँग Debate निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: कुनै real वा fictional personality को नाम दिनुहोस् र कुनै पनि topic मा उनीहरूसँग debate गर्नुहोस्। AI ले debate fair राख्दै उनीहरूको public style र worldview channel गर्छ।

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: AI प्रयोग गरेर Personality सँग Debate: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: स्मरणयोग्य व्यक्तित्वहरू र निष्पक्ष चुनौतीका साथ जीवन्त बहस अभ्यास गर्न चाहने विद्यार्थीहरू।

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: rebuttals practice गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: topic set गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Debate with a personality मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Debate any topic try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: यो बहसले उनीहरूको व्यक्तिगत विश्वास थाहा भएको नाटक नगरी सार्वजनिक शैली र विश्वदृष्टिकोणको प्रयोग गर्दछ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Debate with a personality प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
